note: Genuine, operator-observed physical-device run. Preserved verbatim under UIX8C-R003. NEVER edit a FAIL/PENDING row into PASS. Absence/failure of evidence stays NO-GO (UIX8C-R030). Superseding this run requires a fresh APK bound to a new commit (UIX8C-R004) captured only after code freeze (UIX8C-R005/R024).
decision_reason: Physical run produced genuine failures/pending: R01 identity not visible (PENDING), R11 offline CASH not durably saved (FAIL), R18 layout collapse at 130% font (FAIL). These are the UIX-8C remediation targets and MUST NOT be represented as PASS.

findings.title: Authenticated tenant/outlet identity not visible on cashier surface
findings.observation: Tenant/outlet/cashier/device context header was not clearly presented; identity truthfulness could not be confirmed (UIX8C-R010).

findings.title: Offline CASH sale not persisted durably
findings.observation: Under governed transport failure the CASH sale was not durably saved before the cart cleared; transaction was at risk of loss (violates UIX8C-R012/R013/R014). Remediation owned by UIX-8C-06. DO NOT FLIP TO PASS.

findings.title: Layout collapse at 130% font scale
findings.observation: Primary workflow layout collapsed / clipped primary actions at 130% font (violates UIX8C-R021). Remediation owned by UIX-8C-09. DO NOT FLIP TO PASS.
